name: RGB Colourful LED Strip Lights 220V/110V – 100 Meter IP68
description: The ZION LED USA RGB LED Strip Light features a durable FPC design with IP68 waterproof rating, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor use. It offers smart color-changing effects that sync with music and adjustable color temperatures from 2700–6500K. Available in lengths from 1m to 5m, it suits various spaces. With a 30,000-hour lifespan and 90 lm/W efficiency, it’s both bright and energy-saving.
short_desc: Specifications: Length: 1M / 2M / 3M / 4M / 5M Color: Auto change with music Control: Remote control Dimmable: Yes Light Source: SMD RGB 5050 LED Power: 4.8W Brightness: 900 lm Efficiency: 90 lm/W Voltage: AC 220V (±10%) CCT: 2700–6500K CRI: 80 Material: FPC Waterproof: IP68 Temp Range: -20°C to 50°C Lifespan: 30,000 hours Certifications: CE, RoHS, FCC, EMC, LVD Warranty: 1 year Use: Home, mood lighting, any occasion

images.alt: LED Dotless Linear Strip Lights - Single Colour - Water Resistant
